deliverables.title: Tracey Product Overview

deliverables.goal: Explain how Tracey turns noisy telemetry into governed assessment and controlled action.

deliverables.audience: Security operators, platform teams, and internal enablement
deliverables.goal: Walk through signal ingestion, assessment, posture decisions, fleet awareness, and lifecycle controls.
deliverables.cta: Use Tracey as a governed runtime, not just another alert stream
